title: MineshaftTycoonUtils
description:
Some utility modules for Mineshaft Tycoon on Hypixel Housing.

The modules include:
- A Money Tracker
- An Opt-In Notifier
- Predefined Waypoints for Bedrock
- An Ascension Notifier for T4s
body:
A legacy-fabric utility mod for Mineshaft Tycoon in Hypixel Housing.

Features:
- Money Tracker (Keeps track of how much money you make per hour based on the last 15 seconds of blocks mined.)
- Opt-In Notifier (Plays a sound effect when an opt-in starts)
- Bedrock Waypoints (Hardcoded waypoints for chests with Builder Bedrocks)

Future Plans/Ideas:
- T4 Ascension Notifier (Plays a sound effect when level 325 is reached. Already mostly added, but doesn't work. Likely because of text colors messes with reading level)
- Hide certain spammy texts (e.g. potions and fragments)
- Auto GG (for when people get a rare item such as dante talisman)
- T1 Potion Saver (prevents you from using potions by accidentally sneaking)
- Some sort of settings to reduce hardcoded values
